arts.ttl: Bristol City 'will be focussed' on Middlesbrough challenge promises assistant head coach Hogg
arts.sum: That has meant preparing a grief-stricken team, with the added factor of a number of players returning from international duty too, for the test of Middlesbrough and the prospect of a certain young striker called Tommy Conway keen to impress after his big money move from Ashton Gate this summer. Bristol City face one of the toughest tests in the Championship this weekend, a fixture away at Middlesbrough - after one of the toughest weeks for the club and its players - but assistant head coach Chris Hogg has insisted the players will be focussed, and called on the City fans to unite in support behind them.

arts.ttl: Jason McAteer's Morgan Rogers Aston Villa warning can be good news for Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Former Liverpool star Jason McAteer has picked Morgan Rogers as his standout player in the Premier League so far this season - and in good news for Middlesbrough, he's tipped the England under-21 star to be on the radar of many top clubs. "He’s got a good pedigree and was part of the City youth teams that included Phil Foden and Cole Palmer, but he kind of flew a bit under the radar.

arts.ttl: ‘Capable of making them pay’ – Middlesbrough vs Bristol City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Middlesbrough vs Bristol City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Capable of making them pay’ – Middlesbrough vs Bristol City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough boss Michael Carrick joins Thomas Tuchel England manager debate with fresh take
arts.sum: Asked about his thoughts on Tuchel's appointment as Gareth Southgate's successor and whether playing for a foreign manager made any difference to a player, Carrick said: "Whoever has got the job has got the job. Much has been made about the FA's decision to appoint German manager Thomas Tuchel as the new England boss.

arts.ttl: Tommy Conway's instant positive impression and interesting role - Middlesbrough start debrief - Craig Johns - Teesside Live
arts.sum: Sadly not available for Boro's last three but back in contention for Saturday's clash with the Robins, what's been particularly interesting about those Boro appearances to date is that, despite signing as a centre forward, he's been playing in the role behind the main striker - much in the same way Chuba Akpom was converted back when Carrick first arrived. It's the kind of desire and hunger that has epitomised his busy and lively start to life at Boro, and one which made him instantly popular on the Teesside terraces - helped by the fact he stepped forward in the closing minutes of that Portsmouth game and scored the equaliser from the penalty spot, not shying away from a high-pressure moment to rescue his side.

arts.ttl: Question mark surrounds £4.5m Middlesbrough star’s fitness ahead of Bristol City reunion
arts.sum: Middlesbrough boss Michael Carrick is unsure whether Tommy Conway will be feature to feature against Bristol City at… The post Question mark surrounds £4.5m Middlesbrough star’s fitness ahead of Bristol City reunion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough injury latest for Bristol City with Tommy Conway and Hayden Hackney updates
arts.sum: Middlesbrough will be closely monitoring a number of important players ahead of Saturday's game to see if they will be fit enough to play against Bristol City - including former Robins star Tommy Conway. Offering an update on the injury picture ahead of Saturday's game, Carrick said: "We haven’t lost any more, which is good, and hopefully that continues.
